title: Autonomous Terrain Mapper
description: Developed a ROS-based autonomous robot system that generates high-fidelity 3D terrain maps using LiDAR sensor fusion and SLAM algorithms. Deployed on a custom rover platform.

title: Neural Network Compression Study
description: Researched and implemented structured pruning and knowledge distillation techniques to reduce model sizes by 70% with less than 2% accuracy drop on benchmark datasets.

title: Distributed IoT Sensor Platform
description: Built a scalable IoT pipeline for real-time environmental monitoring across 50+ sensor nodes. Includes edge preprocessing, MQTT messaging, and a live dashboard.

title: Compiler for Subset Language
description: Designed and implemented a full compiler pipeline (lexer → parser → semantic analysis → code generation) for a statically-typed subset language targeting LLVM IR.

title: Protein Structure Predictor
description: Applied graph neural networks to predict secondary protein structures from amino acid sequences, achieving 82% accuracy on the CB513 benchmark dataset.

title: Formal Verification Framework
description: Built a lightweight model checker using BDD-based symbolic execution to verify safety properties of concurrent systems described in a custom specification language.
